title: Video domain research baseline
task: Consolidate current video-mode architecture, reference-project research, and backend-first scope into docs/requirements.md, docs/design.md, docs/tasks.md, docs/domain-profile.md, and docs/domain-profile.json. Keep scope limited to standalone video mode.

title: Backend-first implementation queue
task: Rewrite queue/tasks.csv for a backend-first video convergence batch. Ensure tasks explicitly distinguish backend contract work from frontend alignment work and include validator commands.

title: Unify backend video capability contract
task: Refactor backend video controls/schema/router so video capabilities and constraints are defined in backend catalog/coordinator layers rather than leaking through frontend semantics. Keep edits scoped to video mode only.

title: Move remaining video business rules behind backend contract
task: Audit video mode for remaining business logic outside backend contract. Consolidate request normalization, capability downgrades, and metadata semantics into backend services and document the contract.

title: Align video UI to backend contract
task: Update VideoGenView, VideoGenControls, ChatEditInputArea, and schema consumption so frontend reads and renders backend-defined video capabilities without inventing new business semantics.

title: Remove frontend-only video business branching
task: Strip or reduce frontend-only video capability branching. Keep UI-specific behavior, history presentation, and playback polish, but move policy decisions out of the page layer.

title: Video mode regression and live evidence pass
task: Run the required backend and frontend validators for standalone video mode, then collect focused live evidence for session/history persistence and preview behavior using existing local scripts or narrow reproductions.
validate_cmds: PYTHONPATH=backend backend/.venv/bin/python -m pytest backend/tests/test_google_video_common.py backend/tests/test_google_video_generation_coordinator.py backend/tests/test_modes_video_attachment_params.py -q ;; npx vitest run frontend/components/views/VideoGenView.test.tsx frontend/controls/modes/google/VideoGenControls.test.tsx --environment jsdom

title: Video mode convergence review gate
task: Perform a read-only review of the video-mode convergence batch. Prioritize contract correctness, backend/frontend responsibility boundaries, history/persistence regressions, and residual business logic still living in frontend.
